name: read_file
description: Reads the content of a specified file from the project's file system. Returns the content as a string. Use this to inspect file contents or to get data needed for other operations.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project.

file_path.description: The relative path from project_path to the file to be read. Example: 'src/index.js' or 'README.md'.

encoding.description: The encoding to use for reading the file. Defaults to 'utf8'. Use 'base64' for binary files.

hints.description: This tool is idempotent and non-destructive.
